_comment: Second-wave word-pool growth candidates, sourced from the SEDRA API (Beth Mardutho: The Syriac Institute) via scripts/import-sedra.mjs. Entries are SEDRA lexeme ids, hand-picked from a scan of ids 1-1000 for common, recognizable vocabulary (playable length 2-8, English+French glosses, not already in launch-words.json). Created as Draft only — nl glosses, vocalization/root review, and publish/playable are left to the Owner. A few glosses carry SEDRA data quirks worth a second look before publishing (e.g. lexeme 955 'joy' pairs with an unrelated French 'silo'; lexeme 356 'bless/kneel' pairs with French 'variole' [smallpox]) — authentic source data, not import bugs.
